dsl_rule.translation_notes: Used Donchian Channel (dc_upper/dc_lower) as the 50-period channel breakout mechanism. Volume confirmation interpreted as current volume exceeding the 50-period SMA of volume. Time-based exit (20 bars without new highs) encoded via hold_days_max. The signal is context-dependent but targets TRENDING regimes; mapped to TRENDING_UP as the primary long signal regime.

backtest_rule.reason: Used Donchian Channel (dc_upper/dc_lower) as the 50-period channel breakout mechanism. Volume confirmation interpreted as current volume exceeding the 50-period SMA of volume. Time-based exit (20 bars without new highs) encoded via hold_days_max. The signal is context-dependent but targets TRENDING regimes; mapped to TRENDING_UP as the primary long signal regime.

source_rule_text: Enter a long position when price breaks above the maximum value of a lookback channel; the simplicity and effectiveness of channel breakouts makes them viable as a core trend-following mechanism.
